summary: Bug fix verification testing completed successfully. Both reported bugs (item discount not applying automatically, BOGO applying to all items instead of specific ones) have been fixed and verified.

features_tested.feature: Bug 1: Global item discounts (item_id=null) apply to ALL cart items
verification: WCSD discount (10% item_id=null) now applies to all cart items
Tested with 3 different items - each received 10% discount
Discount name 'WCSD' shows correctly in checkout breakdown

features_tested.feature: Bug 2: BOGO with buy_item_ids=null vs specific items
verification: BOGO with buy_item_ids=null correctly applies to ALL items (global BOGO)
BOGO with buy_item_ids=[] would NOT apply (empty = no items selected)
BOGO with specific buy_item_ids would only apply to those items
Discount name 'BUY 2 GET 1 FREE' shows correctly in checkout breakdown
Correctly applies ₹300 discount for cart total ≥₹5000
For cart of 3 items at ₹1960 each (₹5880 total):

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Global item discount query now handles item_id=None correctly (line 5836-5846)
FIXED: BOGO logic now distinguishes between buy_item_ids=None (global) and buy_item_ids=[] (no items)
GOOD: is_global flag correctly set in both item_discounts and bogo_discounts responses
GOOD: Discount names (WCSD, BUY 2 GET 1 FREE, Spend More Save More) show in UI breakdown

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All discount features verified in UI

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both item discount and BOGO bugs have been fixed. Key fix points: 1) server.py line 5836-5846 checks for global item discount (all targeting fields null), 2) server.py line 5559-5579 checks for global BOGO (buy_item_ids is None vs empty array []). Test file test_item_bogo_discount_bugs.py covers all scenarios.

bug_1.original_issue: Item discount could not apply automatically
bug_1.root_cause: Query did not properly handle global discounts where item_id=null
bug_1.fix: Added is_global_discount check that returns true when all targeting fields are null/empty

bug_2.original_issue: BOGO with specific items still applied to all items
bug_2.root_cause: Logic treated buy_item_ids=[] same as buy_item_ids=null
bug_2.fix: Added distinction: null=global (apply to all), []=no items selected (apply to none)
